parameters.query:
SELECT 
  aw.window_id,
  aw.start_time,
  aw.end_time,
  aw.article_count,
  aw.note_count,
  COUNT(et.task_id) as task_count
FROM aggregation_windows aw
LEFT JOIN processed_articles pa ON pa.window_id = aw.window_id
LEFT JOIN extracted_tasks et ON et.article_url = pa.url
WHERE aw.end_time <= NOW() 
  AND aw.digest_sent = false
  AND aw.article_count > 0
GROUP BY aw.window_id
ORDER BY aw.start_time DESC
LIMIT 1

-- Get top articles by score
SELECT 
  pa.title,
  pa.url,
  pa.score,
  pa.cluster,
  pa.obsidian_note_path,
  pa.summary
FROM processed_articles pa
WHERE pa.window_id = {{ $json.window_id }}
ORDER BY pa.score DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Get cluster summary
SELECT 
  cluster,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  AVG(score) as avg_score
FROM processed_articles
WHERE window_id = {{ $json.window_id }}
  AND cluster IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cluster
ORDER BY count DESC;

-- Get extracted tasks
SELECT 
  et.task_description,
  et.priority,
  et.category,
  pa.title as source_article
FROM extracted_tasks et
JOIN processed_articles pa ON et.article_url = pa.url
WHERE pa.window_id = {{ $json.window_id }}
ORDER BY 
  CASE et.priority 
    WHEN 'critical' THEN 1
    WHEN 'high' THEN 2
    WHEN 'medium' THEN 3
    ELSE 4
  END
LIMIT 15;
